name: 传说世界
short_description: This is an open world real-time combat game The game contains multiple professions, including warriors, mages, shooters, assassins, and ball kings Eliminate the evil dragon in the legendary world, complete the mission, and also travel to the Three Kingdoms City to fight against Lu Bubu.
detailed_description:
This is a real-time combat pixel game that abandons common turn based games and adopts real-time combat to kill enemies. It skips the complicated turn based combat interface and directly battles enemies on the map. Fishing can enhance all-round attributes in the game, and the spinning wheel can also make you stronger step by step.

An open worldview allows you to freely explore every area on the map, and you can also gradually complete tasks to gain a lot of experience and level up, and then transform into stronger ones. The game has over 200 exquisite maps and more than 200 enemy bosses waiting for you to challenge! When you are strong enough, you can also challenge enemies who are all bosses by climbing towers and complete achievements with rich rewards.
